name: Dynac Holdings Corporation
summary: Dynac Holdings Corporation operates and manages multi-business restaurants primarily in Japan. The company engages in the operation and management of various restaurants and drink corners in cultural facilities, such as theaters and music halls; golf courses, ski resorts, and golf club restaurants; and roadside stations and service areas. It also plans and manages various events and parties; and offers catering services. The company operates restaurants primarily under the Hibiki, Uomori, and Toritori names. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 249 stores. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Dynac Holdings Corporation is a subsidiary of Suntory Holdings Limited.
